name: Kaile Science and Technology Co;Ltd.Hubei
summary: Kaile Science and Technology Co;Ltd.Hubei operates in the communications industry in China. The company offers civil and military products, including optical fibers, optical cables, data cables, quantum communication data link products, and intelligence terminal products; electrical cables; and pipe, profiles, and geosynthetic products. It also operates autonomous controllable computing platforms; intelligent accusation terminals; and other civilian and military products, as well as communication silicon tubes, smart phones, wearable products, security positioning equipment, medical information platform, radar, non-standard military products, etc. In addition, the company offers Internet products, including Internet + medical, Internet + Network security, Internet + finance, Internet + real estate marketing, and others. Further, it operates as a service provider for software and hardware manufacturing of high-end communication equipment in the informatization industry; and three industrial parks with a gross floor area of approximately 1,800 mu. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jingzhou, China.
